Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Deft. Should Not Be Held In Contempt, Memorandum Of Pts And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION's motion for an order to show cause regarding contempt is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP Section 1016. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Aug-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Associatioon's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
